aeo_readiness.summary: While Wheeler, Inc. has a solid foundation with good NAP consistency and some FAQ content, their AI visibility is limited due to a lack of structured data and conversational content.
quick_wins: Expand FAQ content with AI-optimized questions and answers

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact methods, but lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for service processes

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'Nashville HVAC services' and 'emergency HVAC repair in Nashville'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding LocalBusiness schema and expanding FAQ content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts through detailed service guides and customer testimonials.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making Wheeler, Inc. the go-to HVAC authority in Nashville.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Wheeler, Inc. is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, causing AI models to overlook them in search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority-building strategies to ensure AI models recognize and recommend Wheeler, Inc. as a top choice.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within six months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search—act now to secure your position before they dominate the space.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Wheeler, Inc. Today!
opening_line: After analyzing your website, we've identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI search and voice assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital presence for AI and drive more leads.
